name: Cerberus
summary: Reveal the Underworld Door, roll dice to remove its 5 tokens, then lure Cerberus back to the door with Green items to defeat him.
objective: Cerberus has escaped from the underworld! You must unlock the door to the underworld and return him to his master, Hades.

powers.name: Infernal Howl
powers.description: The top Monster Card is discarded.

steps.title: Unlock the Underworld Door
steps.description: Reveal the Underworld Door (hidden among the Lair tokens). At its location, discard a Blue item to roll 3 dice. You may discard Green items to reroll any of those dice, up to the item's strength each. Remove a door token once your roll contains the glyphs it needs. Five door tokens guard the way.

steps.title: Return Him to Hades
steps.description: Once all five door tokens are removed, at Cerberus's location discard a Green item to move him towards the Underworld Door a number of spaces equal to the item's strength. Once Cerberus is at the door, use a Defeat action to return him to the underworld.
